$comment: Motion tokens — durations, easings, and named signature motions. Most product surfaces are still; motion is reserved (principle #9). Reduced-motion users get instant via the @media query — see packages/ui/src/tokens/tokens.css.

instant.usage: State swaps that must not feel like animation: filter toggles, accordion open without ceremony.
instant.notes: Also the reduced-motion fallback for fast/base/slow.

fast.usage: Hover and focus transitions, button press, focus ring fade-in.

base.usage: Default for component state changes, modal/sheet open, toast in/out.
base.notes: Tailwind: duration-base. The 'default' duration when no other applies.

slow.usage: Page transitions, signature moments (PR celebrate, set complete draw).
slow.notes: Tailwind: duration-slow. Use sparingly — slow animations test patience.

standard.usage: Default easing for any motion — decelerates into rest.

emphasized.usage: Signature moments only — subtle overshoot at the end. PR celebrate, completion checkmark.
emphasized.notes: Tailwind: ease-emphasized. Never as the default on routine transitions.

linear.usage: Progress indicators where the rate must feel constant — timer rings, loading bars.

signature.$description: Named motions used across the product. Use these by name; do not redefine them. Each has a reduced-motion variant.

stateSnap.usage: Instant change. Accordion open without ceremony, filter toggle.

stateFade.usage: Tooltip in/out, focus state changes, quiet transitions.

sheetEnter.usage: Bottom sheet / side sheet open animation — slide + fade.

prCelebrate.usage: Personal-record moment. Used once per achievement. Scale 1 -> 1.06 -> 1; color text.primary -> signal.pr.
prCelebrate.notes: Reduced-motion variant: color-only, no scale. Paired with haptic on touch viewports.

setComplete.usage: Set-complete checkbox: checkmark draws + slight scale on the fill.
setComplete.notes: Reduced-motion variant: instant fill, no checkmark draw.
